CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value FLOAT);
SELECT id, map() AS empty_map FROM test_table;
SELECT id, map() AS empty_map FROM (SELECT * FROM test_table) AS subquery;
SELECT id, map() AS empty_map FROM (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM test_table) AS unique_ids;
SELECT id, map() AS empty_map, value FROM test_table WHERE value > 1.5;
SELECT t.id, map() AS empty_map FROM test_table t LEFT JOIN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value < 2.5) AS filtered ON t.id = filtered.id;
SELECT t.id, map() AS empty_map, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE value > t.value) AS count_greater FROM test_table t;
WITH RecursiveNumbers AS (SELECT 1 AS num UNION ALL SELECT num + 1 FROM RecursiveNumbers WHERE num < 3) SELECT num, map() AS empty_map FROM RecursiveNumbers;
SELECT map() AS empty_map, (SELECT map() FROM test_table WHERE id = 1) AS nested_map FROM test_table WHERE id < 3;
